I hate Monads

Test Of Blog Features

August 26, 2015

```elixir defmodule Hedwig.Handlers.Echo do @moduledoc “”” A completely useless echo script. This script simply echoes the same message back. “””

@usage nil

use Hedwig.Handler

def handle_event(%Message{} = msg, opts) do reply(msg, msg.body)

end

def handle_event(_, opts), do: {:ok, opts} end ```
